title: Exquisite enchant icons
description: Displays the enchanted icon in the inventory
body:
# Make your enchanted item display its Exquisite enchant icons！ 令你的附魔物品显示精美的附魔图标！

- **This resource pack is available for all versions**
- **这款资源包可以全版本通用**

![icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b63e3ce367c308364e6f17f46cdcedd66357924.png)

**This resource pack displays the enchanted icon of an enchanted item when the player moves the mouse over it.**

**当玩家将鼠标放到附魔物品上时，这个资源包会显示附魔的图标。**

![enchant-1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e37637d38dc07007219e30f5e6961fad47a5804.png)
![enchant-2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee99a5c55a75a950996675dd67a56b7788f1fe53.png)

**When using resource packs, turn off "Force unicode fonts" in the language options, otherwise the icon will not appear!**

**在使用资源包时，请关闭语言选项中的“强制使用unicode字体”，否则图标不会显示！**

![enchant-3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb1b92e5ca84439d5a70b42ebaabe4646d16496e.png)
![enchant-4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e11d960e0d9f35512aa68ecb5900ae0557ff0e87.png)
